title: Calibration Lab Rate Guide 2026
subtitle: Compare ISO/IEC 17025 lab rates and turnaround times
description: Compare calibration lab rates, turnaround times, and service areas across accredited providers. Budget confidently for your equipment maintenance program and source qualified labs without surprise costs or compliance gaps.
bullets: Compare rates across ISO/IEC 17025 accredited providers
Typical industrial calibration costs: $85–$450 per device
Express and standard turnaround times by provider
Service coverage areas to minimize shipping delays

title: Calibration Lab Vetting Guide
subtitle: Verify accreditation, avoid costly mistakes, ensure measurement traceability
description: Find out how to audit calibration labs for ISO/IEC 17025 accreditation, measurement uncertainty, and traceability. This guide walks manufacturers and QA teams through the vetting process to minimize downtime and compliance risk.
bullets: Verify ISO/IEC 17025 accreditation status and scope of credentials
Evaluate measurement uncertainty to match your tolerance requirements
Confirm NIST or national standards traceability before commitment
Spot unaccredited operations that skip proper documentation and exceed standard turnaround times

title: Calibration Program Setup Checklist
subtitle: Start calibration compliance confidently with step-by-step implementation guidance
description: Master the essential steps manufacturers use to establish measurement traceability and ISO/IEC 17025 compliance. This checklist walks QA teams through creating a calibration program that reduces compliance risk and ensures accurate measurements.
bullets: Map equipment to accredited-vs.-internal calibration categories
Build traceability records that survive compliance audits
Set calibration intervals per ISO/IEC 17025 standards
Vet calibration providers: accreditation scope checklist
